{{CargoRelic
|name=Edison's Phonograph
|rank=AAA
|affct=TECH
|birthday=04-11
|source=* Fragment Crafting (1.6%), Lottery Machine (0.03%), Relic Forge (80 Relic RF), Wishing (0.14%)
* [[Indigent Nobleman]] (210k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}})
|description=On Apr 11, 1877, Edison invented the world's first gramophone.

A phonograph is an electrical device used to play records by placing the disc on a turntable and letting it rotate under a stylus. Edison shook the crank and sang a song to the phonograph. Afterwards, he shook the crank lightly and the machine actually imitated him and sang "Mary had a little lamb, whose fleece was white as snow..." The first talking machine caused a sensation in the world at that time.

[Brief History of the Phonograph]

In the 1950s, Scott invented the sonic vibrator. In the 1990s, Berlina successfully developed a disc-shaped record. In the 20th century, stereo recorders became popular.
|fame=42
|art=42
|fth=37
|civ=47
|tech=75
|ss1=Per 5 Mecha Gene LVLs, Snail HP +60<br>Per 5 Mecha Gene LVLs, Snail ATK +6<br>Mecha Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss2=Per 5 Mecha Gene LVLs, Snail HP +80<br>Per 5 Mecha Gene LVLs, Snail ATK +8<br>Mecha Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss3=Per 5 Mecha Gene LVLs, Snail HP +100<br>Per 5 Mecha Gene LVLs, Snail ATK +10<br>Mecha Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss4=Per 5 Mecha Gene LVLs, Snail HP +140<br>Per 5 Mecha Gene LVLs, Snail ATK +14<br>Mecha Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss5=Per 5 Mecha Gene LVLs, Snail HP +180<br>Per 5 Mecha Gene LVLs, Snail ATK +18<br>Mecha Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss7=Per 5 Mecha Gene LVLs, Snail HP +180<br>Per 5 Mecha Gene LVLs, Snail ATK +18<br>Mecha Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150<br>Snail ATK +70
|skill1=[[File:Hellas skill II.png|50px]]Place in Hellas Museum: In Hellas, INTEL gained +7.5%
|skill2=[[File:Hellas skill II.png|50px]]Place in Hellas Museum: This Relic's TECH +10
}}

[[Category:Hellas Museum Boost]]
[[Category:Hellas Exploration Boost]]
[[Category:HP Boost]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:Enhanced by Mecha Gene LVL]]
[[Category:Mechanic Boost]]
[[Category:Snail Mech Boost]]
[[Category:Indigent Nobleman Relics]]
